props.title: About Us
props.subtitle: Craft, comfort and character in every scent

props.text: Escential was created to bring comfort, calm and quiet sophistication into everyday spaces. Every candle is hand-poured in small batches, blending natural wax with carefully selected fragrances and timeless design.
We believe a scent should feel personal. From the first pour to the final detail of the box, everything is designed to turn an ordinary moment into something memorable.
A balanced fragrance that fills the room and lingers.
Made in small batches with attention to every detail.
Clean-burning, sustainable wax for a softer, longer scent.

props.title: THE PREMIUM BOX
props.text: A curated collection created to bring atmosphere, comfort and character into everyday spaces.

props.title: Join our community
props.text: Discover new scents and connect with us on Instagram.
